design_intent: Moody Refined Industrial loft living room with dark metals, exposed brick, worn leather, smoked wood, and a restrained palette grounded in charcoal and cognac.

selected_pieces.product_name: Malinta Contemporary Tufted Club Chair Dark Brown/Espresso
selected_pieces.placement_note: Place as the primary lounge chair angled slightly inward near the brick wall, with its back just off the wall and a small black side table beside the right arm.

selected_pieces.product_name: Costway Coffee Table Retro Mid-Century Coffee Table W/Storage Open Shelf Living Room
selected_pieces.placement_note: Center the coffee table in front of the seating area, aligned parallel to the sofa/chair arrangement, with the open shelf facing outward toward the camera for a lived-in utilitarian look.

selected_pieces.product_name: Costway TV Stand for Up to 55" TVs Entertainment Center with 3-Tier Storage Shelves & Cable Hole Black/White
selected_pieces.placement_note: Float the console against the exposed brick wall as the media anchor, with the TV centered above it and a few styled objects spaced sparsely on the open shelves.

selected_pieces.product_name: Nourison Textured Home Modern Indoor Rug Ivory Beige 7'10" x 9'10"
selected_pieces.placement_note: Lay the rug under the main seating grouping with the front legs of the chair and sofa area resting on it to soften the concrete-and-brick envelope while keeping the palette quiet and grounded.

selected_pieces.product_name: Heavyweight Velvet Curtain Rod Pocket Panels (Set of 2) Beige 120”
selected_pieces.placement_note: Hang the curtain panels floor-to-ceiling on the tallest window opening, letting them pool just slightly to add softness against the hard brick and steel finishes.

selected_pieces.product_name: Sculpted Textured Metal Vase for Living Room Decor - Decorative Flower Vase for Home, Bedroom, and Office Desk Decor -11", Gold & Metallic
selected_pieces.placement_note: Place on the TV console or coffee table as a small metallic sculptural note, offset to one side with a single branch or left empty for a more austere industrial edit.
